focus: Configured CCC-MAGI (Pro) for COMP6733 Project D3; clarified D3 scope, the app/deliverable shape, and the C/C++ toolchain (arduino-cli vs Thonny/MicroPython).

decisions.rule: Project = COMP6733 Project D3: LLM-driven automated embedded development for Arduino Nano 33 BLE Sense, generating C/C++ from natural language.

WHEN a user gives a natural-language request, THE SYSTEM SHALL (laptop-side Python agent) call an LLM API to generate C/C++, compile via arduino-cli, flash the Nano, read serial, and self-correct in a feedback loop. Not a heavy GUI app.
Toolchain = arduino-cli (NOT Thonny/MicroPython, which cannot do C/C++). Separate compile (coding-accuracy, no flash) from upload (completion-rate) to limit flash wear.

Follow course brief scope (5 on-board sensors; 30-50 task bench at 3 levels) + required experiments (feedback vs no-feedback ablation; >=2 LLM cost/latency compare). Paper=method ref, brief=deliverable contract.

open_problems.what: arduino-cli not installed; needs install + Nano board package arduino:mbed_nano
Malformed Stop hook in .claude/settings.json (stray = -> PowerShell parse error each turn; non-blocking)
constitution tech_stack generic Arduino/PlatformIO; refine to arduino-cli + Nano 33 BLE Sense

next_intent: Fresh session: install arduino-cli + Nano board package; fix malformed Stop hook in .claude/settings.json; then draft Week-5 proposal via /feature-draft d3-proposal.
